data.title: Astro Note
data.synopsis:
When he arrives at Astro Lodge to interview for the head chef position, Takumi Miyasaka finds a run-down boarding house instead of a fancy restaurant. Disappointed, Takumi nonetheless demonstrates his skills, much to the delight of the eccentric tenants. The happiest among them is the charming landlady, Mira Gotokuji, who falls in love with his cooking. On the other hand, Takumi falls in love with Mira. He decides to take the job as the breakfast chef at Astro Lodge and moves into Room 5.

Takumi soon notices strange things about Mira; she is hopelessly clueless about modern technology and Japanese food. In addition, Takumi hears an unfamiliar voice coming from Mira's room. What he does not realize is that Mira is an alien who has recently arrived from another planet on an important secret mission.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Astro Note was released on Blu-ray as a box set on September 25, 2024.

data.title: Jiangtun: Feng Shi Wu
data.synopsis:
Do you believe it? All encounters are destined, and two people who truly love each other will eventually come back to each other. Fettered by fate, Jiang Ling, the finless porpoise fairy, reunited with her lover Lin Sheng from her previous life across time and space. 

Even though they lost their memories, they still fell in love with each other again. However, obstacles come one after another. Can the two make up for their past regrets this time? Believe that those who love you will cross mountains and seas just to come for you.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

data.title: Cong Hong Yue Kaishi
data.synopsis:
The story begins with the sudden appearance of a blood-red moon in the sky, known as the Red Moon Incident. The remaining survivors are forced to seek refuge in a city protected by high walls. Among the survivors, some exhibit mental mutations. Those unable to control their mutations emit a mental plague, contaminating those around them and posing a significant threat to the remaining humans. To address the source of the contamination, the walled city establishes a special contamination cleanup department, and our protagonist, Lu Xin, is joining it!

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Heishan Lao Gui's (黑山老鬼) web novel of the same title.
